span.p:
Load PENDING/APPROVED requests for the property
(exclude already-funded)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Score each request:
urgency*0.35 + impact*0.30 + assetImportance*0.20
- costScore*0.15 + categoryBoost

span.p: Rank requests by score, highest first
